sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29747" key="dwdekasu/llabos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωδεκα-σύλλᾰβος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29747.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of twelve syllables</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἀλκαϊκὸν δ.</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον</foreign>) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:10:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:14:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
